title: Hot Cross Buns
content:
Hot Cross Buns!
    Hot Cross Buns!
    One a penny, two a penny,
    Hot Cross Buns!
    If you have no daughters,
    If you have no daughters,
    If you have no daughters,
    Pray give them to your sons;
    But if you have none of these little elves,
    Then you must eat them all yourselves.
meaning:
"Hot Cross Buns" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
